---
title: "Volume II: At Scale"
---

## Machine Learning Systems at Scale

18 decks covering distributed infrastructure, training, deployment, and governance across GPU fleets. 529 slides, 125 SVG figures, approximately 19 hours of teaching material.

```{=html}
<div style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases" class="btn-accent" target="_blank">Download PDFs (Releases)</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol2" class="btn-outline">View Source</a>
</div>

<table class="slide-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Ch</th>
      <th>Title</th>
      <th class="num-col">Slides</th>
      <th class="num-col">Sections</th>
      <th class="num-col">SVGs</th>
      <th class="num-col">~Time</th>
      <th class="num-col">Active Learning</th>
      <th class="dl-col">PDF</th>
      <th class="dl-col">Source</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>0</td>
      <td>ML Systems at Scale</td>
      <td class="num-col">24</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="num-col">5</td>
      <td class="num-col">49 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol2/00_course_overview">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1</td>
      <td>Introduction</td>
      <td class="num-col">34</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">10</td>
      <td class="num-col">76 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol2/01_introduction">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2</td>
      <td>Compute Infrastructure</td>
      <td class="num-col">33</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">72 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">10</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol2/02_compute_infrastructure">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3</td>
      <td>Network Fabrics</td>
      <td class="num-col">32</td>
      <td class="num-col">10</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="num-col">68 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol2/03_network_fabrics">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4</td>
      <td>Data Storage</td>
      <td class="num-col">33</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">69 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol2/04_data_storage">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5</td>
      <td>Distributed Training Systems</td>
      <td class="num-col">32</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">70 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol2/05_distributed_training">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6</td>
      <td>Collective Communication</td>
      <td class="num-col">29</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">64 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol2/06_collective_communication">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>7</td>
      <td>Fault Tolerance and Reliability</td>
      <td class="num-col">32</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="num-col">68 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol2/07_fault_tolerance">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>8</td>
      <td>Fleet Orchestration</td>
      <td class="num-col">33</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">74 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol2/08_fleet_orchestration">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>9</td>
      <td>Inference at Scale</td>
      <td class="num-col">32</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">71 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">10</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol2/09_inference">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>10</td>
      <td>Performance Engineering</td>
      <td class="num-col">32</td>
      <td class="num-col">10</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">72 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol2/10_performance_engineering">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>11</td>
      <td>Edge Intelligence</td>
      <td class="num-col">31</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">6</td>
      <td class="num-col">66 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">10</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol2/11_edge_intelligence">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>12</td>
      <td>ML Operations at Scale</td>
      <td class="num-col">31</td>
      <td class="num-col">6</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">66 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol2/12_ops_scale">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>13</td>
      <td>Security and Privacy</td>
      <td class="num-col">33</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">10</td>
      <td class="num-col">71 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">10</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol2/13_security_privacy">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>14</td>
      <td>Robust AI</td>
      <td class="num-col">33</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">71 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol2/14_robust_ai">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>15</td>
      <td>Sustainable AI</td>
      <td class="num-col">31</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">65 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol2/15_sustainable_ai">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>16</td>
      <td>Responsible AI</td>
      <td class="num-col">31</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">66 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">11</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol2/16_responsible_ai">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>17</td>
      <td>Conclusion</td>
      <td class="num-col">23</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">47 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">10</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol2/17_conclusion">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
  <tfoot>
    <tr style="font-weight: 600; border-top: 2px solid #BE185D;">
      <td></td>
      <td>Total</td>
      <td class="num-col">529</td>
      <td class="num-col">148</td>
      <td class="num-col">125</td>
      <td class="num-col">~19 hrs</td>
      <td class="num-col">163</td>
      <td class="dl-col"></td>
      <td class="dl-col"></td>
    </tr>
  </tfoot>
</table>
```

::: {.callout-note}
PDF download links are placeholders. The compiled PDFs will be available once CI builds are configured.
:::
